name: sw-design-system-guide
description: SW Design System Guide — SW UX GUIDE V2.4

scripts.build: npm run reports:sync && npm run build:bundle
scripts.installer:build: node scripts/audit-bindings.js && rm -rf plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist && mkdir -p plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/s1-design-system-installer && esbuild plugins/figma-vars-installer/src/code.ts --bundle --outfile=plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/s1-design-system-installer/code.js --target=es2017 --platform=browser && cp plugins/figma-vars-installer/manifest.json plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/s1-design-system-installer/manifest.json && cp plugins/figma-vars-installer/src/ui.html plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/s1-design-system-installer/ui.html && rm -f assets/downloads/s1-design-vars-installer.zip && (cd plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist && zip -r -X ../../../assets/downloads/s1-design-vars-installer.zip s1-design-system-installer) && mkdir -p ~/s1-design-system-installer && cp plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/s1-design-system-installer/manifest.json plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/s1-design-system-installer/code.js plugins/figma-vars-installer/dist/s1-design-system-installer/ui.html ~/s1-design-system-installer/
scripts.audit:build: esbuild plugins/figma-component-audit/src/code.ts --bundle --outfile=plugins/figma-component-audit/dist/code.js --target=es2017 --platform=browser && cp plugins/figma-component-audit/manifest.json plugins/figma-component-audit/dist/manifest.json && cp plugins/figma-component-audit/src/ui.html plugins/figma-component-audit/dist/ui.html && mkdir -p ~/s1-component-audit && cp plugins/figma-component-audit/dist/manifest.json plugins/figma-component-audit/dist/code.js plugins/figma-component-audit/dist/ui.html ~/s1-component-audit/
scripts.figma:usage:apply: npm run figma:usage:check && node scripts/figma/apply-figma-usage.mjs && npm run reports:sync && npm run reports:check
